stack-content._comment: Match any stack containing the Julia JIT-symbolized function. We deliberately do NOT anchor on outer frames such as true_main: unwinding through Julia's interpreter / dispatch trampolines is lossy (yields [incomplete] / [unknown mapping] frames), and that is a separate problem from JITDump symbolization. The assertion below fails if the JITDump file is not picked up (e.g. startup race), regardless of unwind quality above the JIT frames.
